code:
import collections

# 1. Dictionary (dict)
# O(1) average for: access, insertion, deletion, membership test
my_dict = {"a": 1, "b": 2}
_ = my_dict["a"]  # Access
my_dict["c"] = 3  # Insertion
del my_dict["a"]  # Deletion
_ = "b" in my_dict  # Membership test
_ = len(my_dict)  # Length

# 2. Set (set)
# O(1) average for: addition, removal, membership test
my_set = {1, 2, 3}
my_set.add(4)  # Addition
my_set.remove(2)  # Removal
_ = 3 in my_set  # Membership test
_ = len(my_set)  # Length

# 3. List (list)
# O(1) for: index access, index assignment, append, pop (from end)
my_list = [10, 20, 30, 40]
_ = my_list[0]  # Index access
my_list[1] = 25  # Index assignment
my_list.append(50)  # Append (amortized O(1))
my_list.pop()  # Pop from end
_ = len(my_list)  # Length

# 4. Deque (collections.deque)
# O(1) for: append, appendleft, pop, popleft
my_deque = collections.deque([100, 200])
my_deque.append(300)  # Append to right
my_deque.appendleft(50)  # Append to left
my_deque.pop()  # Pop from right
my_deque.popleft()  # Pop from left
_ = len(my_deque)  # Length
